query:
You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.218 (commit: b0d37589).

## Issue to Resolve

User report: Can't see or open CSVs
### Checked for duplicates?

- [x] This issue is not a duplicate

### Does it also happen in the desktop version?

- [x] This bug does not occur in the latest version of Anki Desktop

### What are the steps to reproduce this bug?

Exact steps unknown

https://www.reddit.com/r/Anki/comments/1i8b5p3/best_way_to_easily_create_flashcards_on_ankidroid/

User is on Discord and responsive: https://discord.com/channels/368267295601983490/701939078786187315/1332453507789357116

Requested a screenshot of the file in the location, and a screenshot of AnkiDroid not picking it up


![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/429cc47f-d727-4121-b7d9-e11de1788a81)
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9bd58b28-7363-466c-880a-6145a9a5b508)
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e7be5d0c-2a20-4369-8e56-d63d07fbaa76)



### Expected behaviour

The CSV file is visible

### Debug info

```text
AnkiDroid Version = 2.20.1 (e32a82c33646807ea19623c9c88be38965bc07e6)
Backend Version = 0.1.48-anki24.11 (24.11 c47638ca36f99dd4f3b81ae82d964aec66e392e0)
Android Version = 13 (SDK 33)
ProductFlavor = play
Manufacturer = Google
Model = zork
Hardware = bertha
Webview User Agent = Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; zork Build/R133-16151.13.0; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/131.0.6778.260 Safari/537.36
ACRA UUID = 2869b58f-542e-4631-b1a7-ec59807d7558
FSRS = 1.4.3 (Enabled: false)
Crash Reports Enabled = true
```

### (Optional) Anything else you want to share?

While testing, I was having huge problems with 'saving' CSVs in Google Drive, but they didn't appear in the folder I saved them in.

I don't trust files on Android at all

### Research

- [x] I have checked the [manual](https://ankidroid.org/docs/manual.html) and the [FAQ](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki/FAQ) and could not find a solution to my issue
- [x] (Optional) I have confirmed the issue is not resolved in the latest alpha release ([instructions](https://docs.ankidroid.org/manual.html#betaTesting))

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/IntentHandler.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/ImportFileSelectionFragment.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.
